_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

The problem is that `SVGElement` is a browser DOM type that needs to be available in the TypeScript environment, which requires the DOM library to be included in your TypeScript configuration.

---TERMINAL
```bash
# Add DOM library to tsconfig.json if not already present
# Check your tsconfig.json and ensure it includes "DOM" in the lib array
```
---FILEPATH /Users/elonehoo/Developer/destyler-dev/ui/packages/vue/src/utils/unref-element.ts
---FIND
```typescript
import { type ComponentPublicInstance, type MaybeRef, type MaybeRefOrGetter, toValue } from 'vue'

export type VueInstance = ComponentPublicInstance
```
---REPLACE
```typescript
import { type ComponentPublicInstance, type MaybeRef, type MaybeRefOrGetter, toValue } from 'vue'

export type VueInstance = ComponentPublicInstance
export type SVGElement = globalThis.SVGElement
```
